series_metadata.series_description: Requests for proposal (RFP) and contracts with medical providers, e.g. physicians, dentists, hospitals, ambulatory services, medical technical advisors and medical suppliers for services under the Medicaid program. Files include letterhead bids, vendor and evaluation criteria, contractor evaluation, vendor selection justification, copies of purchase orders and invoices, contractor reports and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office, 3 years in Records Center ; Electronic: 5 years in office
